mapper.select: SELECT id, property_type, name, sgg_cd, umd_nm, jibun, build_year, latitude, longitude, latest_sale_price, latest_deposit, latest_monthly_rent FROM property WHERE id = #{propertyId}
SELECT id, exclusive_area, land_area, deal_amount, floor, deal_date, buyer_gbn, seller_gbn FROM sale_deal WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} ORDER BY deal_date DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, exclusive_area, land_area, deposit, monthly_rent, floor, contract_term, contract_type, use_rr_right, pre_deposit, pre_monthly_rent, deal_date FROM rent_deal WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} ORDER BY deal_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property ( property_type, name, sgg_cd, umd_nm, jibun, build_year, latitude, longitude, latest_sale_price, latest_deposit, latest_monthly_rent ) VALUES ( #{propertyType}, #{name}, #{sggCd}, #{umdNm}, #{jibun}, #{buildYear}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 0, 0, 0 )
